collectedData.title: 2. Personal data collected
collectedData.intro: The following personal data may be collected:
items: Any other information voluntarily provided by the user
collectedData.text: Data is collected through contact forms available on the website.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of data processing
purpose.intro: The personal data provided will be used to:
items: Organize and manage participation in Feldenkrais Method classes
Contact the user regarding the services offered

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal basis
items: The performance of a contractual relationship (in case of class registration)

retention.title: 5. Data retention
retention.text: Data will be retained while the relationship with the user is maintained and for the periods necessary to comply with legal obligations.

recipients.title: 6. Data recipients
recipients.text1: Data will not be shared with third parties, except when required by law or when necessary for service provision (for example, management or communication tools).
recipients.text2: No international data transfers are foreseen.

userRights.title: 7. User rights
userRights.intro: The user has the right to:
userRights.requestPrefix: To exercise these rights, the user may send a request to:
userRights.text: The user also has the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD).

requiredData.title: 8. Mandatory nature of data
requiredData.text: Providing data is voluntary, but necessary in order to respond to user requests.

security.title: 9. Security
security.text: Appropriate technical and organizational measures are applied to ensure the security of personal data.

changes.title: 10. Changes to the policy
changes.text: This policy may be updated at any time to adapt to legal or service changes.
